arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca reveals plan to help Chelsea cope with hostile Legia Warsaw atmosphere
arts.sum: Blues are expecting a lively reception for the first leg of their Conference League quarter-final tie

arts.ttl: Dream Osimhen transfer decided as Chelsea eye bombshell deal
arts.sum: Plus, Chelsea received some bombshell news over their top target and Arsenal 'won' the race to sign Viktor Gyokeres . Chelsea and Man Utd target Liam Delap will be available for a bargain fee this summer due to a relegation release clause.

arts.ttl: Chelsea defender Fofana out for rest of season
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca confirms centre-back Wesley Fofana will miss the rest of the season with a hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Chelsea: Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall reflects on 'challenges' in first season as he makes game-time admission
arts.sum: The 26-year-old has started just two Premier League matches since summer move from Leicester

arts.ttl: Wesley Fofana likely to miss rest of Chelsea’s season with muscle injury
arts.sum: Fofana has not featured since starting last month’s 1-0 Premier League loss at Arsenal.

arts.ttl: I know who Chelsea should sign this summer - he would guarantee Maresca goals
arts.sum: Asked about the type of forward Chelsea need to look at, Sinclair named Harry Kane as the "ideal" target, but labelled Ipswich's Delap as the more realistic option after impressing in the Premier League this season. Chelsea should prioritise signing a new centre forward this summer and Liam Delap is the option the club need to target, according to former left-back Frank Sinclair.

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted lineup vs Legia Warsaw - Conference League
arts.sum: How Chelsea could line up for their Conference League clash with Legia Warsaw on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Romano drops Delap BOMBSHELL: Top Chelsea target available for bargain fee
arts.sum: Ipswich Town sharpshooter Liam Delap will be available for just €35 million due to a relegation release clause, according to Fabrizio Romano. According to Fabrizio Romano, there is nothing Ipswich can do to prevent Delap from leaving this summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal win Gyokeres race with sensational contract offer: Chelsea and Man Utd beaten
arts.sum: FootballTransfers has previously detailed that Arsenal have put themselves to the front of the race for Athletic Club winger Nico Williams thanks to their strong financial advantage, and they are set to put this muscle to good use in order to land the Sporting CP striker. Gyokeres is set to be offered a bumper deal worth around €60 million (£50m) over five years, according to Just Arsenal .

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca lays down challenge to Chelsea stars - 'Make us a better team'
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca hopes his Chelsea players show plenty of bravery in front of passionate crowd away to Legia Warsaw in their Europa Conference League quarter-final on Thursday night
